scripts.build:app: pnpm run prepare:blocksuite && pnpm run prepare:assets && pnpm run prepare:bundled-theme-assets && pnpm run prepare:pristine-engine && pnpm run generate:notice && vite build
scripts.predev: pnpm run prepare:blocksuite && pnpm run prepare:assets && pnpm run prepare:bundled-theme-assets && pnpm run prepare:pristine-engine && pnpm run generate:notice
scripts.package: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run verify:node-pty-binary -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:linux: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --linux --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.test:e2e:waveform-perf: pnpm run prepare:bundled-theme-assets && playwright test --config playwright.waveform-perf.config.ts
scripts.package:linux:x64: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --linux AppImage deb --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:win:x64: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run verify:node-pty-binary -- --platform win32 --arch x64 && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --win nsis portable --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:x64: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --mac dmg --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.package:mac:arm64: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run prepare:package-app && electron-builder --projectDir .pristine-package/app --mac dmg --arm64 --config electron-builder.yml
